summary: Completed UI/UX testing for Iteration 13 - Three UI fixes: 1) Accounts page filter layout (inline flex), 2) History tab interleaving, 3) Sidebar collapse toggle. All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Sidebar toggle button exists with data-testid='sidebar-toggle-btn'
Clicking collapse button collapses sidebar to 72px (icon-only view)
Navigation icons remain visible and clickable in collapsed state
Clicking expand button re-expands sidebar to 256px
Main content area shifts from 256px to 72px left position when sidebar collapses
Main content area returns to original position when sidebar expands
Accounts page filter container uses flex wrap layout
Search input, Village filter, Status filter, Date picker, Apply Filters button all present
All filter elements are in the same row (Y position diff <= 11px)
Date range picker properly aligned with other filter inputs
Apply Filters button is inline with filters (same row)
History tab shows both 'Account Closed' and 'Account Reopened' events
History events are interleaved by array index (close[i] → reopen[i])
History events displayed in descending order (newest first)
Mobile sidebar opens when hamburger menu is clicked
Mobile navigation items are visible and clickable

accounts_filter_layout.details: Filter section uses flex wrap layout with all inputs in a single row. Y position difference between elements is only 11px, confirming proper alignment.

sidebar_collapse_toggle.details: Sidebar has 'Collapse' button at bottom (desktop only). Expanded: 256px, Collapsed: 72px. Main content shifts by 184px when toggled. Icons remain clickable in collapsed state.

history_tab_interleaving.details: History tab shows 8 events for ACC000039. Events are interleaved by array index (close[i] pairs with reopen[i]) and displayed in descending order (newest first). Account has 3 closes and 5 reopens - the extra reopens appear at the top after reversal.

mobile_sidebar.details: Mobile view shows hamburger menu. Clicking opens sidebar with navigation items. Sidebar closes after navigation.

critical_code_review_comments: App.js: sidebarCollapsed state properly toggles sidebar width between 256px and 72px
App.js: PanelLeftClose/PanelLeftOpen icons correctly indicate collapse/expand state
App.js: Main content div uses transition-all duration-200 for smooth animation
AccountsPage.js: Filter section uses 'flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3' for inline layout
AccountDetailPage.js: History interleaving logic correctly pairs close[i] with reopen[i] by index
AccountDetailPage.js: historyEvents.reverse() ensures descending order (newest first)
seed_data_creation: Used existing account ACC000039 with 3 closes and 5 reopens for history testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 13 UI fixes verified. Key changes: 1) Accounts page filters now use flex wrap layout (inline row). 2) Sidebar has collapse toggle at bottom - expanded: 256px, collapsed: 72px. 3) History tab interleaves close/reopen events by array index and displays in descending order. Test account ACC000039 has inconsistent data (more reopens than closes) but interleaving handles it correctly.
